ingredients_text: Ingredients Milk Chocolate 63.8% [Sugar, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin), Natural Vanilla Flavouring], Caramel 36% [Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Coconut Oil, Water, Sweetened Skimmed Condensed Milk (Milk, Sugar, Lactose (Milk), Milk Chocolate (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Whole Milk Powder, Whey Powder (Milk), Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin)), Butter (Milk), Natural Flavouring, Salt, Cream (Milk), Salted Butter (Milk), Stabiliser (Pectin)], Salt 0.2%. Allergy Advice: For allergens please see ingredients listed in BOLD. May contain traces of Nuts & Cereals containing Gluten.
